title: 1. Surah Al-Fatihah for Any Illness
reference: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "Surah Al-Fatihah is a cure for every disease." (Sunan al-Darimi 3413; Mishkat al-Masabih 2170)
translation: Recite Surah Al-Fatihah, the Opening chapter of the Qur'an, as a cure.

title: 2. Dua for a Sick Person's Recovery
translation: I ask the Mighty Allah, Lord of the Mighty Throne, to heal you.

title: 3. Dua to Recite with Each Verse of Surah Al-Fatihah for Any Illness
translation: Begin with the ruqyah seeking-refuge formula, then Bismillah, then recite Surah Al-Fatihah, pausing after each verse to ask Allah for healing.

title: 4. Dua for Pain
translation: In the Name of Allah [x3]. I seek refuge in the might and power of Allah from the evil of what I feel and what I fear [x7].

title: 5. Dua for Boils, Lumps, and Similar Ailments
translation: In the Name of Allah, the dust of our earth, with the saliva of some of us, cures our sick, by the permission of our Lord.

title: 6. Dua for Recovery from Illness (1)
translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the affliction and grant healing, for You are the Healer; there is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no illness behind.

title: 7. Dua for Recovery from Illness (2)
translation: In the Name of Allah I perform ruqyah over you, from everything that troubles you, from the evil of every soul or envious eye. May Allah heal you. In the Name of Allah I perform ruqyah over you.

title: 8. Treatment for the Evil Eye
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from every devil, every harmful pest, and every harmful eye.

title: 9. Dua for Recovery from Illness (3)
translation: In the Name of Allah, may He heal you, free you from every illness, and from the evil of an envier when he envies, and from the evil of every possessor of an evil eye.

title: 10. Dua to Drive Away Shaytan When Children Show Anger, Stubbornness, or Crying
translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils, and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me.

title: 11. Protection from Fear and the Whispers of Shaytan
translation: 1. I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger, His punishment, the evil of His creation, the whispers of the devils, and their presence with me. 2. Do not fear, you will be victorious.

title: 12. Removing the Evil Eye
translation: Or do they envy people for what Allah has given them of His bounty? We had certainly given the family of Ibrahim the Scripture and wisdom, and We had given them a great kingdom.

title: 13. Practice for Falling Asleep
translation: If sleep does not come, recite Ayatul Kursi, repeating the seeking-refuge phrases within it as needed.

title: 14. Ruqyah Bath (or Lote-Leaf Bath) for Sihr, Magic, or Any Difficulty
translation: A ruqyah bath -- water recited over (or mixed with crushed lote/sidr leaves) and then used to bathe -- used traditionally for sihr, black magic, or other afflictions.

title: 15. The Six Verses of Healing (Ayat ash-Shifa)
reference: 1. Surah At-Tawbah 9:14 | 2. Surah Yunus 10:57 | 3. Surah An-Nahl 16:69 | 4. Surah Al-Isra 17:82 | 5. Surah Ash-Shu'ara 26:80 | 6. Surah Fussilat (Ha-Meem) 41:44
translation: 1. And Allah heals the hearts of the believers. 2. And a cure for what is in the breasts, and guidance and mercy for the believers. 3. From their bellies comes a drink of varying colors in which there is healing for people. 4. And We send down of the Qur'an that which is a healing and a mercy for the believers. 5. And when I am ill, it is He who cures me. 6. Say: it is, for those who believe, a guidance and a healing.
